name: 25-invalid-capability-dangling-evidence
description: A capability's evidence[] references id 'ev-dangling' which does not appear in the top-level aibom.evidence[] ledger. Harness rejects at semantic-validation.
notes: Evidence references must resolve to records in the ledger. Dangling references mean the capability has no substantiation, which defeats the schema-rule evidence:minItems:1 rule at a semantic level even though the array itself is non-empty. Harness checks every capability.evidence[] id against the ledger after schema-validation confirms structural shape.
